description_long: This hamburger features a thick, triangular sandwich with a golden-brown top bun, crowned by a green olive on a toothpick. Melted yellow cheese oozes over the edges, covering a dark brown patty and crisp, ruffled green lettuce. A slice of red tomato is visible beneath the cheese, adding a pop of color and freshness. The bottom bun mirrors the top in color and texture, completing the stacked layers. The overall appearance is appetizing, with the cheese and toppings generously distributed and the olive garnish adding a classic deli touch. The surface of the bun is smooth and slightly glossy, with no visible sesame seeds.
description: A triangular hamburger with melted cheese, lettuce, tomato, and a brown bun topped with a green olive on a toothpick. The layers are thick and visually rich, with cheese dripping over the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full stack of bun, cheese, patty, lettuce, and tomato, with the olive garnish centered on top.
description_view_1: Side angle highlights the melted cheese dripping down and the thickness of the layers, with the olive and toothpick visible from above.
description_view_2: Back view emphasizes the triangular shape, the smooth top bun, and the cheese flowing over the patty and lettuce.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle reveals the layered structure and the olive garnish, with the cheese and lettuce prominently displayed.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is layered directly above the bottom bun, followed by a slice of tomato, a beef patty, and melted cheese that drips over the sides. The top bun is placed above the cheese, with an olive and toothpick garnish centered on top.
